PostToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.tsx?$' && echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '/functions/'; then cd /Users/cristian/Documents/dev/Ravl/ravl-opt-engine/functions && npx eslint --fix --no-warn-ignored "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

PreToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(\.env|local\.settings\.json)$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit secrets files (.env, local.settings.json). See AGENTS.md.' && exit 1; fi; exit 0
